response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq), but the role is a Director-level IC Principal Engineer requiring 15 years of experience with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms. The resume shows roughly 13 years of post-degree professional experience, no advanced degree, no recognized AI thought leadership, and only a few months of tangential AI work. The seniority gap and lack of demonstrated AI strategy impact make this a poor fit for a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Track record of community leadership via workshops, talks, and open-source GIS platform
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at strategic scale
Experience level (~13 years) falls short of the 15-year Principal/Director IC requirement
No evidence of advising strategic customers or driving cloud/AI platform strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI platforms
Seniority and scope below Principal/Director IC level
Recent MCP and AI-agent infrastructure exposure
